message:
test: add proptest suite for LfuCache (15 properties, 200 cases)

- len bounded by capacity after arbitrary inserts
- get returns latest value if key still present
- peek does not change frequency
- get increments frequency by exactly 1
- remove makes key absent and invariants hold
- clear empties everything
- eviction targets lowest-frequency entry
- stats hits+misses equals total get calls
- insert existing key updates value without eviction
- random ops (insert/get/peek/remove) maintain invariants
- stats serde roundtrip
- zero capacity stores nothing
- frequency starts at 1 on fresh insert

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
